headline: Eosinophilic Esophagitis Market in the US to Grow at 13.2% CAGR During the Forecast Period (2026–2036) Owing to the Emergence of Drug Classes Such as TSLP Inhibitors, Glucocorticoid Receptor Agonists, and Immunomodulators | DelveInsight
summary: The eosinophilic esophagitis market is witnessing steady growth, primarily driven by the increasing awareness leading to standardized diagnosis and high relapse rates that continue to fuel ongoing treatment demand. Additionally, the expected launch of emerging therapies such as Tezepelumab (TEZSPIRE) (AstraZeneca and Amgen), APT-1011 (fluticasone propionate) (Ellodi Pharmaceuticals), IRL201104 (Revolo Biotherapeutics), Vonoprazan (VOQUEZNA) (Phathom Pharmaceuticals), and others will further prop
